$comment: Product-specific testing configuration. Copy this file to your project's .buildpilot/testing.config.json and customize. Agents read this before writing or running any test.

runner.workers_reason: Explain WHY this worker count. Examples: 'Supabase session pooler limits to 20 connections' or 'Local Postgres, unlimited connections — use CPU count' or 'Shared CI runner with 2 cores'

strategy_notes.storage_state: Playwright saves localStorage+cookies after login, reuses across tests. Best for cookie/JWT apps.
strategy_notes.api_token: Generate a token via API before tests, inject as header. Best for API-first apps.
strategy_notes.cookie: Set auth cookie directly via browser context. Best for simple session apps.
strategy_notes.none: No auth needed (public app or tests create their own sessions)

auth.fresh_before_run_note: Set true if tokens expire quickly or Zustand hydration conflicts with stale state
auth.multiple_sign_in_buttons_note: If login page has OAuth buttons alongside email/password, set true. Agent must use .first() on sign-in button.

page_load_notes.domcontentloaded: Use when app has polling, websockets, or long-running fetches. Fastest. Pair with hydration_indicator.
page_load_notes.networkidle: Use when app makes finite requests and settles. Simplest but hangs on apps with polling.
page_load_notes.load: Wait for all resources including images. Slowest. Rarely needed.

wait_strategy.hydration_indicator: [data-testid='app-ready'] | [data-tour='main-nav'] | selector that only renders after React hydrates
wait_strategy.hydration_timeout_note: How long to wait for SPA to become interactive. Set based on: auth init time + initial data fetch time + render time.

ui_blockers.name: cookie_banner | onboarding_tour | announcement_modal
ui_blockers.description: What it is and why it blocks tests

selectors.$comment: Map logical names to CSS/role selectors. Agents use these instead of hardcoding. Update when UI changes.

strategy_notes.api_seed: Create test data via API calls in globalSetup. Best isolation. Requires API endpoints for create+delete.
strategy_notes.fixture_file: Load from JSON/SQL fixture. Fast but brittle if schema changes.
strategy_notes.shared_account: Use a pre-seeded test account. Simplest but tests can interfere with each other.
strategy_notes.none: Tests create their own data inline. Slowest but most isolated.

database.impact: Explain how workers × requests_per_page_load relates to pool limits

rate_limiting.localhost_exempt_note: If false, agent must throttle interactions or reduce parallelism

frontend.framework: nextjs | vite | cra | remix | nuxt | svelte
frontend.hydration_time_seconds: 1-3 for Vite, 5-15 for Next.js with data fetching

frontend.note: Any special notes about the frontend test setup

known_issues.workaround: How to handle it in tests
